CustomField.formula: CASE(TEXT(Job_Title_Picklist__c), "Physician", 144, "Medical Director", 120, "Assistant Medical Director", 120, "Lead Advanced Practice Provider", 140, "Advanced Practice Provider", 140, "Nurse Practitioner", 140, "Physician Assistant", 140, "Resident", 180, "Physician Advisor", 144, "Travel Physician", 180, "Telehospitalist", 120, "Registered Nurse", 140, "Licensed Practical Nurse", 140, 140)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is the FTE equivalent hours based upon the Job's Title
CustomField.label: FTE Hours
